What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Minions & Monsters - Official Big Game Spot (2026)
snippet.description:
Watch the Big Game Spot for Minions & Monsters, a new installment in the animated film franchise distributed by Illumination. The film embarks on a new adventure within the Minions universe with all-new characters in Minions & Monsters, in theaters on July 1.

This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created. 

Minions & Monsters is directed by Academy Award® nominee Pierre Coffin, a director of the first three Despicable Me films and the first Minions film. Coffin has also provided the voice for the Minions since their film debut in 2010. The film is written by Brian Lynch (Minions, The Secret Life of Pets films) and Pierre Coffin and is produced by Illumination’s Academy Award® nominated founder and CEO Chris Meledandri and by Bill Ryan (executive producer, The Super Mario Bros. Movie). The executive producer is Brian Lynch.

Minions & Monsters is in theaters on July 1.

#IGN

snippet.title: Prince Indah - Mirima (Official Video) sms SKIZA 9846021 to 811
snippet.description:
Timeless Anthems: Prince Indah’s Sixth Studio Masterpiece

In the heart of timeless elegance, Timeless Anthems—the sixth album from Kenyan Ohangla icon Prince Indah emerges as a symphony of enduring rhythms and heartfelt storytelling. Adorned with an hourglass motif symbolizing eternity and flanked by grand bookshelves evoking wisdom’s vast library, the album’s artwork captures Prince Indah in regal crimson velvet, exuding poise and passion. 
This collection weaves traditional Luo melodies with modern pulses, crafted to resonate across generations, produced under the Malaika Music banner for a sound that’s both nostalgic and boundary-breaking.
Spanning 16 tracks, Timeless Anthems invites listeners into a world of love, reflection, and cultural pride. Standouts include the soulful opener "Ngima Dhano," the vibrant "Atieno Nyar Chula" paired with "Mama Love" the introspective "Pedeshe (Ajawa Marwa)," and the uplifting "Believe Me." 
Deeper cuts like "Rapudo,"  "Berna" (Above & Beyond), "Jofitina," "Mirima," "Jaherana ft Zegge Delongeur," "Nyasuba," "Jambaka," and the tender closer "Nyi Luo" and "I Love You" deliver anthemic hooks that linger long after the final note.
Set for its grand launch on November 8, 2025, this album is more than music—it’s a celebration of heritage reimagined for the future. Let Prince Indah’s voice carry you into infinity.

Artist: Prince Indah
Title: Timeless Anthems
Producer : Teddy B
Stream: https://tr.ee/Timeless_Anthems-Album_...
©EMC 2026

snippet.title: Bridget Blue – NI WEWE (Official Video)
snippet.description:
NI WEWE, a heartfelt love anthem that celebrates certainty, devotion, and choosing one person in a world full of noise.

This is not just a love song. It’s a confession. It’s that moment when you stop searching and realize… it’s you.

With emotionally rich vocals, cinematic visuals, and a mature sound that blends modern Afro-R&B with soulful East African influence, NI WEWE captures what it feels like to love with intention and clarity.

If you’ve ever looked at someone and known deep inside this is my person, this song is for you.

🎧 Stream NI WEWE here:
https://onerpm.link/Niwewe-BridgetBlue

snippet.title: Mbosso - Darasa La Saba (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"Darasa La Saba" is a quiet love letter to first love and broken dreams. Two hearts meet in childhood, then life pulls them apart. Poverty, distance, and time standing in the way. As his dream of becoming a doctor fades, his search for her never does. Moving from place to place, she becomes a memory he still chases, not for the past, but for peace. It’s a song about love that grows up before it ever gets a chance to grow old, The song tells a tender story of love that grows up before it ever gets the chance to grow old. The video was shot in Bukoba region, Tanzania

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.
